findings.description: Author explicitly states they could not run 'go test ./pkg/k8cache' locally due to disk space constraints. A cache-invalidation correctness fix must have passing tests before merge. CI must be green.
Log message 'key will be deleted from the cache' refers to the namespace-scoped key only, but DeleteKeys also evicts the all-namespace entry. Update log to reflect both keys being invalidated.
Correct approach: reuses DeleteKeys helper for consistent invalidation semantics. Test additions properly cover the all-namespace scenario.
